AI Smart Socks — Product Design Document
AI Wearable · Fall Prevention

Every Step,
Guarded

SageStep is a multi-modal sensing and edge-AI-powered smart sock designed for bilateral foot-contact imbalance risk prediction and immediate fall detection in older adults.

Explore Product
Scroll to Explore
Core Technology

Bilateral Foot-Contact
Imbalance Prediction

Through fused perception from a three-zone thin-film pressure array and a 6-axis IMU, SageStep captures subtle Center of Pressure (COP) shifts, identifies inter-foot asymmetry, and issues early warnings weeks before a potential fall.

Static Balance Assessment

30-second single-leg standing test with millimeter-level COP trajectory analysis

Dynamic Gait Analysis

Real-time double-support duration and pressure-ratio monitoring to detect instability patterns

Immediate Fall Detection

On-sock state-machine inference triggers alerts within 100 ms, preserving data privacy

Specifications

Precision Woven
Into Every Thread

At just 30–38 grams per sock — comparable to an ordinary thick cotton sock — flexible circuitry, solid-state battery, and pressure-sensing arrays are seamlessly integrated.

<38g
Weight per Sock
72h
Battery Life
100Hz
Sampling Rate
<100ms
Fall Detection Latency
IP67
Water Resistance
10m
Bluetooth Range
Algorithm Architecture

Edge-Cloud Collaborative
Intelligence

Sensor acquisition, real-time inference, and long-term risk modeling are distributed across the sock, gateway, and cloud — balancing response speed with predictive accuracy.

Gait-Cycle Segmentation
100 Hz IMU data
Heel strike / support / swing labels On Sock
Fall-Detection State Machine
Acceleration + gyroscope + pressure
Fall confidence, 0–1 On Sock
Static-Balance Calculation
30-second pressure data
COP deviation and three-zone asymmetry indices On Sock
Dynamic Double-Support Analysis
Gait cycle + pressure data
Double-support pressure ratio and duration difference Cloud
Risk-Scoring Engine
Weighted eight-factor input
0–100 risk score Cloud
AI Explanation Generation
Textual statistical summary
Natural-language risk explanation LLM
Product Roadmap

From Validation
to Universal Care

A clear iterative path ensuring every milestone is grounded in real-world validation.

MVP
Manual-Input Simulator
Rule engine + WeChat Mini Program; validates core alerting logic and push-chain workflow
V1.0
Dual-Sock Prototype
Arduino with Bluetooth auto-acquisition; static + dynamic dual-modal balance analysis
V1.1
Institutional Pilot
50 flexible-circuit pairs; 14-day automatic baseline learning and trend analysis
V2.0
Mass Production
10,000-pair target; multi-institution SaaS; community linkage and optional emergency-service integration

Ready to Guard
Every Step?

We are actively collaborating with eldercare institutions, rehabilitation centers, and community service organizations to bring intelligent fall-prevention solutions to life.
